X-H2S COMPANION

Tutorial · Presets · SOS · Manual · Exercises

Official manual

The complete German text of all 404 pages is built into this app and searchable offline — search always works, even with no network. Opening a page also shows the real PDF page with illustrations (needs a network connection for that); with no network it automatically falls back to the built-in text view. The English offline text isn't extracted yet — see the note below.

📥 Download the manual PDF 🌐 Online manual (web)

Jump straight to a chapter

Chapter shortcuts below use page numbers from the German PDF and aren't available here yet — the English PDF's real page numbers haven't been confirmed. Full-text search above covers the German manual for now; use the PDF/online links to browse the English manual directly.

Loading PDF page …

Text-only view (no illustrations, PDF unavailable) · Open the PDF externally instead
